testcase.name: TC_ACC_08

15:05:51 [main] INFO utils.RequestResponseLogger - REQUEST: URI: https://demo.testfire.net/api/login Method: POST Headers: Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Body: {"username":"jsmith","password":"demo1234"} 15:05:54 [main] INFO utils.RequestResponseLogger - RESPONSE: Status Code: 200 Body: { "Authorization": "YW5OdGFYUm86WkdWdGJ6RXlNelE9Oj8/Pz8/", "success": "jsmith is now logged in" } 15:06:00 [main] INFO utils.RequestResponseLogger - REQUEST: URI: https://demo.testfire.net/api/account/800003/transactions Method: POST Headers: Authorization=YW5OdGFYUm86WkdWdGJ6RXlNelE9Oj8/Pz8/ Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Body: {"startDate":"2027-01-12","endDate":"2027-01-14"} 15:06:01 [main] INFO utils.RequestResponseLogger - RESPONSE: Status Code: 200 Body: { "transactions": [
] }

testcase.name: TC_ACC_09
testUserJourney[jsmith, demo1234, 800002, 2025-06-01, 2025-12-31, 800002, 800003, 1, Adil, radhika@gmail.com, Regd.Home loan, What is the interest rate?](1)
testcase.system-out:
15:06:04 [main] INFO utils.RequestResponseLogger - REQUEST: URI: https://demo.testfire.net/api/login Method: POST Headers: Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Body: {"username":"jsmith","password":"demo1234"} 15:06:05 [main] INFO utils.RequestResponseLogger - RESPONSE: Status Code: 200 Body: { "Authorization": "YW5OdGFYUm86WkdWdGJ6RXlNelE9OgY/Tj8SMj8=", "success": "jsmith is now logged in" } 15:06:12 [main] INFO utils.RequestResponseLogger - REQUEST: URI: https://demo.testfire.net/api/login Method: POST Headers: Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Body: {"username":"jsmith","password":"demo1234"} 15:06:14 [main] INFO utils.RequestResponseLogger - RESPONSE: Status Code: 200 Body: { "Authorization": "YW5OdGFYUm86WkdWdGJ6RXlNelE9OhZJbH4/Bz8=", "success": "jsmith is now logged in" } 15:06:14 [main] INFO utils.RequestResponseLogger - REQUEST: URI: https://demo.testfire.net/api/account/800002/transactions Method: POST Headers: Authorization=YW5OdGFYUm86WkdWdGJ6RXlNelE9OhZJbH4/Bz8= Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Body: {"startDate":"2025-06-01","endDate":"2025-12-31"} 15:06:15 [main] INFO utils.RequestResponseLogger - RESPONSE: Status Code: 200 Body: { "transactions": [
] } 15:06:15 [main] INFO utils.RequestResponseLogger - REQUEST: URI: https://demo.testfire.net/api/transfer Method: POST Headers: Authorization=YW5OdGFYUm86WkdWdGJ6RXlNelE9OhZJbH4/Bz8= Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Body: {"toAccount":"800003","fromAccount":"800002","transferAmount":"1"} 15:06:17 [main] INFO utils.RequestResponseLogger - RESPONSE: Status Code: 200 Body: { "success": "1.0 was successfully transferred from Account 800002 into Account 800003 at 5/18/26 4:36 AM." } 15:06:17 [main] INFO utils.RequestResponseLogger - REQUEST: URI: https://demo.testfire.net/api/feedback/submit Method: POST Headers: Authorization=YW5OdGFYUm86WkdWdGJ6RXlNelE9OhZJbH4/Bz8= Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Body: {"name":"Adil","email":"radhika@gmail.com","subject":"Regd.Home loan","message":"What is the interest rate?"} 15:06:18 [main] INFO utils.RequestResponseLogger - RESPONSE: Status Code: 200 Body: { "comments": "What is the interest rate?", "subject": "Regd.Home loan", "name": "Adil", "email": "radhika@gmail.com" } 15:06:19 [main] INFO utils.RequestResponseLogger - REQUEST: URI: https://demo.testfire.net/api/logout Method: GET Headers: Authorization=YW5OdGFYUm86WkdWdGJ6RXlNelE9OhZJbH4/Bz8= Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Body: null 15:06:20 [main] INFO utils.RequestResponseLogger - RESPONSE: Status Code: 200 Body: { "LoggedOut": "True" } { "LoggedOut": "True" }

testcase.name: testUserJourney[jsmith, demo1234, 800002, 2024-06-01, 2025-12-31, 800002, 800003, 2, Anusha, fs@yahoo.com, Regd.Personal loan, When can I clear my personal loan?](2)
testGetAccountDeatilsSchema
TC_FDB_01_ValidFeedback
testcase.system-out: 15:06:37 [main] INFO utils.RequestResponseLogger - REQUEST: URI: https://demo.testfire.net/api/login Method: POST Headers: Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Body: {"username":"jsmith","password":"demo1234"} 15:06:38 [main] INFO utils.RequestResponseLogger - RESPONSE: Status Code: 200 Body: { "Authorization": "YW5OdGFYUm86WkdWdGJ6RXlNelE9OkVqdz8/Pz8=", "success": "jsmith is now logged in" } 15:06:38 [main] INFO utils.RequestResponseLogger - REQUEST: URI: https://demo.testfire.net/api/feedback/submit Method: POST Headers: Authorization=YW5OdGFYUm86WkdWdGJ6RXlNelE9OkVqdz8/Pz8= Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Body: {"name":"John Smith","email":"john@test.com","subject":"Test Subject","message":"Test Message"} 15:06:40 [main] INFO utils.RequestResponseLogger - RESPONSE: Status Code: 200 Body: { "comments": "Test Message", "subject": "Test Subject", "name": "John Smith", "email": "john@test.com" }

testcase.name: TC_AUTH_01_ValidLogin
testcase.system-out: 15:07:03 [main] INFO utils.RequestResponseLogger - REQUEST: URI: https://demo.testfire.net/api/login Method: POST Headers: Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Body: {"username":"jsmith","password":"demo1234"} 15:07:04 [main] INFO utils.RequestResponseLogger - RESPONSE: Status Code: 200 Body: { "Authorization": "YW5OdGFYUm86WkdWdGJ6RXlNelE9On5VPy0/P1E=", "success": "jsmith is now logged in" } 15:07:05 [main] INFO utils.RequestResponseLogger - REQUEST: URI: https://demo.testfire.net/api/login Method: POST Headers: Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Body: {"username":"jsmith","password":"demo1234"} 15:07:06 [main] INFO utils.RequestResponseLogger - RESPONSE: Status Code: 200 Body: { "Authorization": "YW5OdGFYUm86WkdWdGJ6RXlNelE9Oj8/Pz8/Nz8=", "success": "jsmith is now logged in" } { "Authorization": "YW5OdGFYUm86WkdWdGJ6RXlNelE9Oj8/Pz8/Nz8=", "success": "jsmith is now logged in" }

testcase.name: TC_AUTH_08_validLogout
testcase.system-out: 15:07:16 [main] INFO utils.RequestResponseLogger - REQUEST: URI: https://demo.testfire.net/api/logout Method: GET Headers: Authorization=YW5OdGFYUm86WkdWdGJ6RXlNelE9On5VPy0/P1E= Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Body: null 15:07:17 [main] INFO utils.RequestResponseLogger - RESPONSE: Status Code: 200 Body: { "LoggedOut": "True" } { "LoggedOut": "True" }
